title: Pan-Fried Gyoza Bites with Cheese
description: A crispy and savory snack made by wrapping gyoza with cheese and pan-frying them. This is a delicious and easy-to-make appetizer or snack.

ingredients.name: Gyoza
ingredients.notes: Available in most Asian grocery stores

instructions: 1. Remove the gyoza wrappers from the package and set them aside.
2. In a mixing bowl, combine the shredded cheese.
3. Place a small spoonful of cheese in the center of each gyoza wrapper.
4. Dip your finger in a small amount of water and run it along the edges of the wrapper.
5. Fold the wrapper into a triangle by bringing the two opposite corners together to form a point.
6. Press the edges together to seal the gyoza.
7. Heat a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
8. When the skillet is hot, add a small amount of oil to prevent sticking.
9. Pan-fry the gyoza in batches until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per side.
10. Serve the pan-fried gyoza hot with your favorite dipping sauce, such as spicy sauce.
